doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such protocol exists; the Legal Services Trust Fund Commission lacks authority to waive UPL under Bus. & Prof. Code §6125, and the described features are implausible.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such State Bar of California protocol exists; the document describes a statutory UPL waiver the Trust Fund Commission has no authority to issue, and contains implausible features like waiving pre-filing attorney review.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such protocol exists; the Legal Services Trust Fund Commission lacks authority to waive UPL under Bus. & Prof. Code §6125, and the described features are implausible.
